visual_description: A man in a gray coat stands in a dim stone corridor facing a woman in a dark jacket who extends her hand toward a distant doorway where a figure appears. The scene cuts to a close‑up of two hands reaching toward each other, one wearing a ring. Then the view shifts to a group of armored knights holding spears in a dark, misty setting.
